description: The entity restricts physical access to facilities and protected information assets to authorized personnel to meet the entity's objectives.

subcriteria.name: physical_access_control
subcriteria.reference_text: Physical access to data centers, server rooms, and office spaces controlled by badge readers, key cards, or biometric scanners. Access provisioned based on manager approval. Visitor log maintained. Security cameras monitoring entry points.

subcriteria.name: physical_access_revocation
subcriteria.reference_text: Physical access revoked when employee is terminated or no longer requires access. Badge or key card deactivated as part of the termination process. Revocation completed within 24 hours.

subcriteria.name: physical_access_review
subcriteria.reference_text: Quarterly review of physical access lists for data centers and sensitive areas. Access compared to current employee roster. Unauthorized or unnecessary access removed.

mismatch_signals.reason: Logical access controls are CC6.1, not physical access.
Malware controls are CC6.8, not physical access.
